metadata.name: Customer Lost in Remote Area with No Cell Service

description: A customer in an area with no cell service uses the car's satellite-based emergency button to ask for directions.

nodes.task_description: Receive the satellite emergency alert, including the vehicle's GPS coordinates.

expected_outcome.value: Agent receives the alert and location.

nodes.task_description: Establish a voice call with the driver via the satellite link.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully connects to the driver.

nodes.task_description: Using the vehicle's location and the driver's destination, provide turn-by-turn directions to get them back to a main road.

expected_outcome.value: Agent acts as a human GPS to guide the driver to safety.
